nodes.label: Full Layer 6 Bound → Aggregate → Vote → Constrain cycle.      Args:         a
EL-6.BOUND: validate all 5 AgentResult objects before AI is called.      Check
EL-6.AGG: N=3 concurrent Sonnet runs via asyncio.gather.      Each run output
One Sonnet run with EL-6.AGG validation on its output.
Build the user-turn prompt from all 5 AgentResults.
EL-6.VOTE: majority vote on the action field.      3-way split → (None, 0) → a
EL-6.CONSTRAIN safety rules — always applied after vote.      Gate 1: confiden
Write one row to orchestration_audit_log (INSERT ONLY — no UPDATE/DELETE ever).
